title: Scout : Tenderfoot
body:
Retextures the [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout) mod's satchel, pouch, and material textures to be more up to date with Minecraft's textures.

![showcase of all item retextures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/609424091e6dc189beeb9c3fd5809eb824b30eaa.jpeg)

You are free to use this in a modpack, no need to ask for permission!

Not affiliated with [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout) or its creator.
